titles.title: Free to be the Servant of the Lord

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'm free, I'm free, I'm free to be the servant of the Lord I'm free, I'm free, I'm free to be the servant of the Lord

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He taught me how to praise Him He taught me how to sing a song He taught me how to love I'm free to be the servant of the Lord
